mapper.select:
select p.post_id, p.member_id, p.place_id, p.title, p.content, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.readcount, p.category, m.nickname as nickname from post p join member m on p.member_id = m.member_id
and p.category = #{category}
and (p.title like concat('%', #{q}, '%') or m.nickname like concat('%', #{q}, '%'))
order by p.post_id desc

select p.post_id, p.member_id, p.place_id, p.title, p.content, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.readcount, p.category, m.nickname as nickname, pl.title as placeName from post p join member m on p.member_id = m.member_id left join place pl on p.place_id = pl.place_id where p.post_id = #{postId}
mapper.update: update post set readcount = readcount + 1 where post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: insert into post (member_id, place_id, title, content, category) values (#{memberId}, #{placeId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{category})
mapper.update: update post set title= #{title}, content= #{content}, category = #{category}, place_id = #{placeId} where post_id = #{postId}
